Name.jp: マグノリアの魔法使い〈術〉
Name.zh: 麦格诺里亚元素魔法师

description.en: Attacks an enemy and has a <color=#28d9ed>25%</color> chance to inflict <color=#28d9ed>Burned</color> on the target for <color=#28d9ed>1 turn(s)</color>.
description.jp: 敵単体にダメージを与え、対象に<color=#28d9ed>25%</color>の確率で<color=#28d9ed>火傷</color>を<color=#28d9ed>1ターン</color>の間付与する。
description.kr: 적을 공격하고 <color=#28d9ed>25%</color> 확률로 대상에게 <color=#28d9ed>1턴</color> 동안 <color=#28d9ed>화상</color>을 부여합니다.
description.zh: 攻击敌人,并有<color=#28d9ed>25%</color>的几率对目标造成<color=#28d9ed>烧伤</color>效果,持续<color=#28d9ed>1回合</color>。

description.en: Attacks an enemy and has a <color=#28d9ed>10%</color> chance to inflict <color=#28d9ed>Frozen</color> on the target for <color=#28d9ed>1 turn(s)</color>.
description.jp: 敵単体にダメージを与え、対象に<color=#28d9ed>10%</color>の確率で<color=#28d9ed>凍結</color>を<color=#28d9ed>1ターン</color>の間付与する。
description.kr: 적을 공격하고 <color=#28d9ed>10%</color> 확률로 대상을 <color=#28d9ed>1턴</color> 동안 <color=#28d9ed>빙결</color> 상태로 만듭니다.
description.zh: 攻击敌人,并有<color=#28d9ed>10%</color>的几率使目标陷入<color=#28d9ed>冰冻</color>状态,持续<color=#28d9ed>1回合</color>。

description.en: Attacks all enemies and has a <color=#28d9ed>25%</color> chance to inflict <color=#28d9ed>Burned</color> on the target for <color=#28d9ed>1 turn(s)</color>.
description.jp: 敵全体にダメージを与え、対象に<color=#28d9ed>25%</color>の確率で<color=#28d9ed>火傷</color>を<color=#28d9ed>1ターン</color>の間付与する。
description.kr: 적 전체를 공격하고 <color=#28d9ed>25%</color> 확률로 대상에게 <color=#28d9ed>1턴</color> 동안 <color=#28d9ed>화상</color>을 부여합니다.
description.zh: 攻击全体敌人,并有<color=#28d9ed>25%</color>的几率对目标造成<color=#28d9ed>烧伤</color>效果,持续<color=#28d9ed>1回合</color>。

description.en: (Passive Effect)\nIncreases Defense by <color=#28d9ed>25%</color> every time the caster takes a turn.
description.jp: (パッシブ効果)\n自分のターンが来るたびに、防御力が<color=#28d9ed>25%</color>UPする。
description.zh: (被动效果)\n每到自身回合时,使防御力提升<color=#28d9ed>25%</color>。

description.en: (Passive Effect)\nDamage dealt increases based on the number of debuffs on the target when attacking.\nAt the start of battle, increases <color=#28d9ed>Critical Damage</color> for <color=#28d9ed>2</color> turns.
description.jp: (パッシブ効果)\n攻撃時、対象の弱体効果の数に応じてダメージがUPする。\n戦闘開始時、<color=#28d9ed>会心ダメージ</color>が<color=#28d9ed>2ターン</color>の間UPする。
description.kr: (패시브 효과)\n공격 시 대상이 보유한 약화 효과가 많을수록 피해량이 증가합니다.\n전투 시작 시 <color=#28d9ed>2턴</color> 동안 <color=#28d9ed>치명 피해</color>가 증가합니다.
description.zh: (被动效果)\n攻击时,目标持有的减益效果越多,造成的伤害越高。\n战斗开始时,在<color=#28d9ed>2</color>回合内提高<color=#28d9ed>暴击伤害</color>。
